title: Feasibility Studies
subheadline: Minimizing risk and validating economic viability from the ground up.
description: Comprehensive site evaluation and project feasibility.
fullDescription: We conduct in-depth feasibility studies to evaluate the technical, economic, and environmental viability of projects before implementation. This ensures minimized risks and optimized planning.
painPoints: Project developers often struggle with unexpected regulatory roadblocks, hidden site costs, and uncertain financial models. We provide early-stage clarity to prevent multi-million dollar mistakes down the line.
approach: Our multidisciplinary team conducts rigorous site reconnaissance, socio-environmental baseline surveys, and financial modeling. We deliver bankable feasibility reports that satisfy stringent lender requirements and international standards.

caseStudy.title: Kabeli-B HEP
caseStudy.description: A run-of-river hydroelectric project located in eastern Nepal, providing clean energy to the national grid. This strategic project demonstrates excellence in sustainable energy development with comprehensive technical audit and supervision.

testimonial.quote: CEC Nepal's feasibility report was the most thorough technical document our credit committee had seen in years. It made project approval seamless.
testimonial.author: Rajendra Shrestha
testimonial.title: Chief Investment Officer
